name: pitch_reversal
description: Pitch equivalent of yaw_reversal.json: full pitch up held just long enough to reach steady-state max rate (tau_pitch ~0.146s, so 0.8s is >5 tau of margin), hard flip to full pitch down held 1.0s, then neutral. Kept short for the same frame-exit reason as yaw_reversal.json -- see its description.
